ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offense_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense classification */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Legal statutes or codes */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Typical penalties associated with the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense type */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Legal statutes or codes */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Typical penalties associated with the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonality" (
  "seasonality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonality type */,
  "seasonality_name" TEXT /* Name of the seasonality type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seasonality type */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "cycle" TEXT /* Cycle of the seasonality (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seasonality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, law enforcement officer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigating_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each offense classification
Typical penalties associated with the classification
Unique identifier for each offense type
Typical penalties associated with the type
Unique identifier for each seasonality type
Cycle of the seasonality (e.g., monthly, quarterly)
Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, law enforcement officer)
Date and time the user account was created
Date and time the user account was last updated
Unique identifier for each priority level
